children.text: the term “covered grant” means a grant from the Attorney General or the Secretary of Health and Human Services under section 7104(b), 7105(b), or 7105(f) of this title; and
the term “covered recipient” means a grantee or subgrantee receiving funds under a covered grant.

the conditions under section 40002(b)(2) of the Violence Against Women Act of 1994 () that apply with respect to grants under such Act and grantees and subgrantees for such grants; or34 U.S.C. 12291(b)(2)
